title: Seafarer[Fabric]
description: A fabric port of the Seafarer[Forge] mod
body:
This is a port of the [Seafarer[Forge]](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seafarer-forge) mod to fabric. The current version is a direct port of the current forge version and improvements shall be made in due time.

This mod adds more flair to the oceans of minecraft! 
Content Now inclues:

Beach Glass Blocksets with 10 Colors, Brick Variants, Tile Variants and More!
6 Sea Shell Blocksets with Tiles, Pillars, and More!
6 Decorative Plants
Sea Stars
Floatsome
Crabs, Marine Iguanas, Horseshoe Crabs and Sunfish
Algae Blocks
Shell Blockset (Alternative to Wood)
 

 

For suggestions, bug reports and general chat about the mod, join the discord server below!
[Join our Discord Server Here!](https://discord.gg/az7B3Y6UPW)
